items.situation: You are authorizing a runway crossing at Taxiway Alpha. Build the crossing instruction.
items.target_phrase: CROSS RUNWAY TWO SEVEN AT ALPHA

items.situation: Airport operations requests to proceed as requested near the runway and no extra restriction is needed. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: PROCEED AS REQUESTED

items.situation: A mower is operating left of Runway 27 and you need to pass that traffic information. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: MOWER LEFT OF RUNWAY TWO SEVEN

items.situation: LLWAS shows an arrival microburst alert for Runway 17: a forty-knot loss at the three-mile final. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY ONE SEVEN ARRIVAL MICROBURST ALERT FORTY KNOT LOSS THREE MILE FINAL

items.situation: A pattern aircraft should turn base now. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: TURN BASE LEG NOW

items.situation: You observe an aircraft on approach with its landing gear still up. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: LANDING GEAR APPEARS UP

items.situation: An aircraft calls the tower before you are ready to establish two-way communications inside the Delta. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: REMAIN OUTSIDE DELTA AIRSPACE AND STANDBY

items.situation: An aircraft needs to leave the movement area and taxi to the ramp via Alpha. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: TAXI TO THE RAMP VIA ALPHA

items.situation: A disabled aircraft is on the runway and you must issue runway-condition information. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: DISABLED AIRCRAFT ON RUNWAY

items.situation: Runway 27 is closed and a pilot requests a landing clearance anyway. Build the required response.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY TWO SEVEN CLOSED UNABLE TO ISSUE LANDING CLEARANCE LANDING WILL BE AT YOUR OWN RISK

items.situation: A Boeing 757 reports poor braking on the first half of the runway. Build the braking-action advisory.
items.target_phrase: BRAKING ACTION POOR FIRST HALF OF RUNWAY REPORTED BY A BOEING SEVEN FIFTY-SEVEN

items.situation: No braking action reports have been received for Runway 27. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: NO BRAKING ACTION REPORTS RECEIVED FOR RUNWAY TWO SEVEN

items.situation: A pilot asked about arresting gear status and the barrier indicates up. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: BARRIER INDICATES UP CLEARED TO LAND

items.situation: The far field monitor shows the Runway 27 localizer is unreliable. Build the cautionary advisory.
items.target_phrase: CAUTION MONITOR INDICATES RUNWAY TWO SEVEN LOCALIZER UNRELIABLE

items.situation: A pilot is approaching a turnoff and you need to specify the turn. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: TURN LEFT ON THE TAXIWAY YOU ARE APPROACHING

items.situation: An aircraft is departing from the Bravo intersection on Runway 26 Right with 4,000 feet available. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY TWO SIX RIGHT AT BRAVO INTERSECTION DEPARTURE FOUR THOUSAND FEET AVAILABLE

items.situation: An aircraft is taxiing to Runway 36 Left via Alpha and must hold short of Runway 27 Right. Build the taxi clearance.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY THREE SIX LEFT TAXI VIA ALPHA HOLD SHORT OF RUNWAY TWO SEVEN RIGHT

items.situation: A light aircraft must follow a Boeing 757 to Runway 36 Left via Alpha, and you need a jet-blast caution. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: FOLLOW BOEING 757 RUNWAY THREE-SIX LEFT TAXI VIA ALPHA CAUTION JET BLAST

items.situation: Low IFR conditions require you to keep traffic clear of the Runway 27 ILS critical area. Build the hold-short instruction.
items.target_phrase: HOLD SHORT OF RUNWAY TWO SEVEN ILS CRITICAL AREA

items.situation: An arrival may miss the approach and there is taxiing traffic right of the runway. Build the missed-approach advisory.
items.target_phrase: IN THE EVENT OF MISSED APPROACH TAXIING AIRCRAFT RIGHT OF RUNWAY

items.situation: A following aircraft should be sequenced behind a Cessna on short final. Build the sequencing instruction.
items.target_phrase: NUMBER TWO FOLLOW THE CESSNA ON SHORT FINAL

items.situation: The runway is shortened and you must include that in departure information. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY TWO SEVEN SHORTENED

items.situation: Gate hold procedures are in effect and all aircraft must contact ground on point nine for engine-start time. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: GATE HOLD PROCEDURES ARE IN EFFECT ALL AIRCRAFT CONTACT GROUND ON POINT NINE FOR ENGINE START TIME

items.situation: A departing aircraft needs its departure frequency and beacon code. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: DEPARTURE FREQUENCY ONE TWO FOUR POINT SIX SQUAWK FOUR SIX THREE TWO

items.situation: You cannot issue takeoff yet, but the aircraft can line up and wait on Runway 18 while a Boeing 737 is six-mile final. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY ONE EIGHT LINE UP AND WAIT TRAFFIC A BOEING SEVEN THIRTY SEVEN SIX MILE FINAL

items.situation: A departure must wait because of wake turbulence from previous traffic on the same runway. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: HOLD FOR WAKE TURBULENCE

items.situation: An intersection departure must wait because wake-turbulence separation is required. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: HOLD FOR WAKE TURBULENCE

items.situation: A departure is at the full length of Runway 30. Build the takeoff clearance.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY THREE ZERO FULL LENGTH CLEARED FOR TAKEOFF

items.situation: A takeoff clearance must be canceled because of traffic on the runway. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: CANCEL TAKEOFF CLEARANCE TRAFFIC ON THE RUNWAY

items.situation: An arriving aircraft should enter left base. Build the pattern-entry instruction.
items.target_phrase: ENTER LEFT BASE

items.situation: An aircraft is cleared to land on Runway 27. Build the landing clearance.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY TWO SEVEN CLEARED TO LAND

items.situation: An arrival can land and you need to tell the pilot that another aircraft will depart before the arrival reaches the runway. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY ONE EIGHT CLEARED TO LAND TRAFFIC WILL DEPART PRIOR TO YOUR ARRIVAL

items.situation: You cannot see the aircraft, but you can still issue the landing clearance on Runway 23. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: NOT IN SIGHT RUNWAY TWO THREE CLEARED TO LAND

items.situation: After landing, you need the aircraft to turn left at Charlie and hold short of Runway 27 Right. Build the runway-exit instruction.
items.target_phrase: TURN LEFT AT CHARLIE HOLD SHORT OF RUNWAY TWO SEVEN RIGHT

items.situation: A low approach is approved, but the aircraft must stay at or above 2,000 feet because of traffic. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: CLEARED LOW APPROACH AT OR ABOVE TWO THOUSAND TRAFFIC CESSNA ON SHORT FINAL

items.situation: Closed traffic is approved and you want a midfield-downwind report. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: LEFT CLOSED TRAFFIC APPROVED REPORT MIDFIELD DOWNWIND

items.situation: A military aircraft is entering an overhead pattern on Runway 6 with wind 070 at 8 and pattern altitude 6,000. You want an initial report. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: RUNWAY SIX WIND ZERO SEVEN ZERO AT EIGHT PATTERN ALTITUDE SIX THOUSAND REPORT INITIAL

items.situation: A simulated flameout aircraft reaches low key. Build the required report request.
items.target_phrase: REPORT LOW KEY

items.situation: A helicopter requests an air-taxi directly to the helipad. It must avoid vehicles and remain at or below 500 feet. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: AIR-TAXI VIA DIRECT TO THE HELIPAD AVOID VEHICLES REMAIN AT OR BELOW FIVE HUNDRED

items.situation: A helicopter is departing from the helipad and should make a right turn for northbound departure while avoiding Taxiway Alpha. Build the takeoff clearance.
items.target_phrase: MAKE RIGHT TURN FOR NORTHBOUND DEPARTURE AVOID TAXIWAY ALPHA CLEARED FOR TAKEOFF

items.situation: A helicopter should make a straight-in approach to the helipad, remain south of Runway 27, and is cleared to land. Build the landing clearance.
items.target_phrase: MAKE APPROACH STRAIGHT-IN TO THE HELIPAD REMAIN SOUTH OF RUNWAY TWO SEVEN CLEARED TO LAND
